name: adx-loop
description: ADX (Agent Development Experience) self-improvement loop. Each cycle: read prior retro's queued harness fix → ship that fix → ship a gameplay/product feature that pressure-tests the surface → retro (top pain + one queued fix for next cycle) → log a single composite metric. Discipline borrowed from Karpathy autoresearch: one change per iteration, mechanical single number, git as memory, binary keep/discard. Optimizes the development environment, not the product — the product is the pressure-test surface.
